positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u35,axiom,
    manager(james)).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    go_building(james)).

cnf(u43,negated_conjecture,
    schedule_meeting(james)).

cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    lunch_building(james)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~lunch_building(X0) | schedule_meeting(X0)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~schedule_meeting(X0) | go_building(X0) | ~employee(X0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~lunch_home(X0) | working_remote(X0) | ~employee(X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~employee(X0) | lunch_home(X0) | lunch_building(X0)).

cnf(u48,axiom,
    ~working_remote(james)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~working_remote(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    employee(james)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
